body:
## Why

Goal of this branch: prepare Dealix for a **full paid market launch (KSA)**. After
exploring the repo from three angles (doctrine, engineering, GTM) and reading the
actual code, the finding was clear: the platform is **already saturated** —
backend payment, ZATCA Phase-2 issuance, refund state machine, reconciliation,
~70 verify scripts, and ~100 launch docs all exist. So "prepare everything"
honestly means **measure true state with existing gates and close the few genuine
remaining gaps on the real paying-customer money path** — not generate redundant
material.

## What changed

- **`GET /api/v1/checkout/status`** (`api/routers/pricing.py`) — authoritative,
  non-PII payment status (Moyasar API → `PaymentRecord` fallback → `pending`).
  Added to the public-path allowlist (`api/security/api_key.py`).
- **Checkout return page** (`apps/web/app/checkout/return/`) — the Moyasar
  redirect target `{APP_URL}/checkout/return` previously **404'd** for paying
  customers. Now an AR-first bilingual success / pending / failed page that polls
  the status endpoint. `npm run build` compiles the route.
- **L5 revenue proof on paid** — the webhook now records a sourced
  `payment_confirmed` proof event (`evidence_source=moyasar://payment/<id>`,
  `consent_for_publication=False`). Upholds the proof-first doctrine for real
  online payments; **no external send, no auto-charge.**
- **`scripts/security_smoke.py`** — corrected pre-existing false positives so the
  canonical `make prod-verify` code gates are green: allowlist `.env*.example`
  templates; ignore `tests/` fixtures and repeated-char placeholders
  (`sk_live_xxxx…`). Real deployed source stays fully scanned; gitleaks remains
  the dedicated scanner for `tests/`.
- **billing test** — allow the rung-0 free diagnostic (0 halalas) while still
  requiring positive charges for paid plans.
- **Tests** — `tests/test_checkout_status_and_proof.py` (status endpoint +
  proof wiring, paid/pending/failed/degraded paths).
- **`docs/LAUNCH_READINESS_VERDICT_2026-06-06.md`** — single dated, evidence-based
  GO/NO-GO verdict.

## Verification

- `make prod-verify` → `env-check`, `security-smoke`, `api-contract-check`,
  `dependency-inventory`, `release-manifest` all pass. `v5-verify` probes the
  **live** `https://api.dealix.me` with prod keys (founder/ops action — not a
  code defect).
- `pytest tests/test_checkout_status_and_proof.py tests/test_billing_moyasar_safety.py tests/test_no_*.py tests/test_commercial_doctrine.py tests/test_payment_*.py tests/test_moyasar_payment_sync.py -q` → **green (39)**.
- `cd apps/web && npm run build` → `/checkout/return` compiles.

## Safe by default

Code stays env-gated: `DEALIX_MOYASAR_MODE` defaults to manual (NO_LIVE_CHARGE),
`ZATCA_SANDBOX=true`. Flipping to live card-charging + real ZATCA clearance is a
**founder action** (set production secrets), enumerated in the verdict doc.

Draft — opening for review before flipping live.

https://claude.ai/code/session_019d2g4CHDk4sHBoDtPtyAmG

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_019d2g4CHDk4sHBoDtPtyAmG)_

commits.messageBody:
Complete the real paying-customer journey for paid launch and fix the
canonical local verification bundle. Backend payment/ZATCA/refund/recon
were already implemented; this closes the remaining money-path gaps:

- GET /api/v1/checkout/status: authoritative, non-PII payment status
  (Moyasar API -> PaymentRecord fallback -> pending). Public-path allowlisted.
- apps/web /checkout/return: the Moyasar redirect target previously 404'd;
  AR-first bilingual success/pending/failed page that polls the status API.
- Webhook now records a sourced L5 revenue proof event on confirmed paid
  payments (proof-first doctrine), no external send, no auto-charge.
- security_smoke: fix pre-existing false positives (.env*.example templates;
  tests/ fixtures and repeated-char placeholders) so `make prod-verify`'s
  code gates are green. Real source stays fully scanned; gitleaks owns tests/.
- billing test: allow rung-0 free diagnostic (0 halalas) while still
  requiring positive charges for paid plans.
- Add tests for status endpoint + proof wiring; add dated readiness verdict.

https://claude.ai/code/session_019d2g4CHDk4sHBoDtPtyAmG
commits.messageHeadline: feat(launch): close paid-customer money path + green canonical gates

commits.messageBody:
These JSON files are regenerated by `make prod-verify`
(export_dependency_inventory / export_release_manifest) and were never
tracked; ignore them so local verification runs don't dirty the tree.

https://claude.ai/code/session_019d2g4CHDk4sHBoDtPtyAmG

The public /api/v1/checkout/status endpoint passed a user-controlled id
into the Moyasar provider URL. Validate it against a strict opaque-token
charset (^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{6,64}$) before any provider/DB lookup, rejecting
path-traversal / SSRF-shaped input with 400. Adds coverage.

https://claude.ai/code/session_019d2g4CHDk4sHBoDtPtyAmG
commits.messageHeadline: harden(checkout): validate payment/invoice reference before outbound use

commits.messageBody:
- pricing.py: strip CR/LF from provider payment id before logging
  (log-injection alert), matching the surrounding safe-logging pattern.
- test: remove unused `json` import.
- CheckoutReturnClient: remove unused `polls` state.

https://claude.ai/code/session_019d2g4CHDk4sHBoDtPtyAmG
commits.messageHeadline: fix(codeql): sanitize proof log + drop unused import/variable

title: feat(launch): close paid-customer money path + green canonical gates
